conditions_text:
임계치: T>=40.0C → 'Move quickly', P>=250.0W → 'Reduce load', V>=14000.0MiB → 'Free memory'
card-1: T=44.0C >= 40.0C → action(s): Move quickly
포함할 action 문구: ['Move quickly']
